title: Citrus-Glazed Colby Jack Nabemono
description: A Japanese-inspired hot pot dish featuring a citrusy glaze, melted colby jack cheese, and a variety of ingredients.
instructions: Bring the nabemono broth to a simmer in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the cooked pork sausages, carrots, and green beans to the pot.
Reduce heat to low and keep warm.
In a small saucepan, combine the citrus zest and honey over low heat.
Stir until the honey dissolves and the mixture is smooth.
Increase heat to medium and cook the glaze for 2-3 minutes, or until it thickens slightly.
Serve the hot pot with the citrus glaze spooned over the top.
Sprinkle the pieces of colby jack cheese over the top and serve immediately.
